languages.text: Впереди ждала неизвестность. Света {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люменов{/g} хватало только на то, чтобы увидеть гладкие стены, уходящие в темноту глубоко внизу, и бесчисленные платформы, парящие над пустотой. Проклятое строение словно издевалось над нами, и я принял его вызов, как и подобает Вольному Торговцу. Спуск по платформам превратился в серию головокружительных прыжков, и лишь феррум санктум, коим было благословлено мое тело, спас меня от падения и даровал победу — мне удалось обнаружить в стенах несколько боковых коридоров.

traits.locale_text: Впереди ждала неизвестность. Света {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люменов{/g} хватало только на то, чтобы увидеть гладкие стены, уходящие в темноту глубоко внизу, и бесчисленные платформы, парящие над пустотой. Проклятое строение словно издевалось над нами, и я принял его вызов, как и подобает Вольному Торговцу. Спуск по платформам превратился в серию головокружительных прыжков, и лишь феррум санктум, коим было благословлено мое тело, спас меня от падения и даровал победу — мне удалось обнаружить в стенах несколько боковых коридоров.

languages.text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the Ferrum Sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.
languages.original_text: Впереди ждала неизвестность. Света {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люменов{/g} хватало только на то, чтобы увидеть гладкие стены, уходящие в темноту глубоко внизу, и бесчисленные платформы, парящие над пустотой. Проклятое строение словно издевалось над нами, и я принял его вызов, как и подобает Вольному Торговцу. Спуск по платформам превратился в серию головокружительных прыжков, и лишь феррум санктум, коим было благословлено мое тело, спас меня от падения и даровал победу — мне удалось обнаружить в стенах несколько боковых коридоров.

traits.locale_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent over the platforms became a series of dizzying leaps, and it was only the ferrum sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me victory, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the ferrum sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

The unknown awaited below. Lumens provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness. The cursed structure seemed to be mocking us, and I took up its challenge as any Rogue Trader should. The augmentations that had become part of my body over many long years did not let me down. Thanks to them, I was able to discover several side corridors leading to utility tunnels.

There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent over the platforms became a series of dizzying leaps, and it was only the ferrum sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me victory, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the ferrum sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

languages.text: 前方的一切都是未知。{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}只能勉强照亮延伸进黑暗的光滑墙体，以及悬浮在虚空中的无数平台。这座被诅咒的建筑仿佛在嘲弄我们，而我接受了它的挑战——这才是行商浪人该有的样子。下降之路唯有一连串的平台跳跃，过程令人眼花缭乱。若非我身上这些被赐福的钢铁圣所，我早已失足坠落。可我成功了，并在墙体上发现了数条侧向通道。
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the Ferrum Sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

traits.locale_text: 前方的一切都是未知。{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}只能勉强照亮延伸进黑暗的光滑墙体，以及悬浮在虚空中的无数平台。这座被诅咒的建筑仿佛在嘲弄我们，而我接受了它的挑战——这才是行商浪人该有的样子。下降之路唯有一连串的平台跳跃，过程令人眼花缭乱。若非我身上这些被赐福的钢铁圣所，我早已失足坠落。可我成功了，并在墙体上发现了数条侧向通道。

languages.text: No había forma de saber qué había más adelante. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} apenas proporcionaban la luz necesaria para revelar las paredes lisas que se adentraban en la oscuridad y el sinfín de plataformas que flotaban sobre el vacío. Era como si la estructura maldita se burlara de nosotros. Como Comerciante Independiente que soy, acepté el reto. El descenso se convirtió en una serie de saltos vertiginosos entre plataformas, y solo el ferrum sanctum de mi cuerpo impidió que cayera y me permitió avanzar, descubriendo numerosos pasillos en los muros.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the Ferrum Sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

traits.locale_text: No había forma de saber qué había más adelante. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} apenas proporcionaban la luz necesaria para revelar las paredes lisas que se adentraban en la oscuridad y el sinfín de plataformas que flotaban sobre el vacío. Era como si la estructura maldita se burlara de nosotros. Como Comerciante Independiente que soy, acepté el reto. El descenso se convirtió en una serie de saltos vertiginosos entre plataformas, y solo el ferrum sanctum de mi cuerpo impidió que cayera y me permitió avanzar, descubriendo numerosos pasillos en los muros.

languages.text: C'est l'inconnu qui nous attendait en contrebas. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} nous fournissaient juste assez de lumière pour laisser apparaître des parois lisses à perte de vue dans les ténèbres et d'innombrables plateformes flottant au-dessus du vide. La structure maudite semblait nous rire au nez, et je décidai de relever le défi, comme tout bon libre-marchand l'aurait fait à ma place. La descente se transforma en une succession de sauts vertigineux d'une plateforme à l'autre, et c'est uniquement grâce au Ferrum Sanctum dont mon corps avait la chance d'être doté que j'ai évité une chute mortelle et découvert plusieurs couloirs latéraux dans les parois.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the Ferrum Sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

traits.locale_text: C'est l'inconnu qui nous attendait en contrebas. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} nous fournissaient juste assez de lumière pour laisser apparaître des parois lisses à perte de vue dans les ténèbres et d'innombrables plateformes flottant au-dessus du vide. La structure maudite semblait nous rire au nez, et je décidai de relever le défi, comme tout bon libre-marchand l'aurait fait à ma place. La descente se transforma en une succession de sauts vertigineux d'une plateforme à l'autre, et c'est uniquement grâce au Ferrum Sanctum dont mon corps avait la chance d'être doté que j'ai évité une chute mortelle et découvert plusieurs couloirs latéraux dans les parois.

languages.text: Bizi neyin beklediğini bilmenin imkânı yoktu. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lümenler{/g}, karanlığın derinliklerine uzanan pürüzsüz duvarları ve boşluğun üzerinde asılı duran sayısız platformu ortaya çıkaracak kadar ışık sağlıyordu. Lanetli yapı, âdeta bizimle alay ediyordu. Ben de bir Hür Tacir'e yakışır şekilde bu meydan okumayı kabul ettim. İnişimiz, platformlar arasında baş döndürücü sıçramalar dizisine dönüştü. Duvarlardaki birkaç yan koridoru keşfedebildiğim için beni düşmekten kurtaran ve başarıya ulaştıran tek şey, vücudumun kutsandığı demir kutak oldu.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the Ferrum Sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

traits.locale_text: Bizi neyin beklediğini bilmenin imkânı yoktu. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lümenler{/g}, karanlığın derinliklerine uzanan pürüzsüz duvarları ve boşluğun üzerinde asılı duran sayısız platformu ortaya çıkaracak kadar ışık sağlıyordu. Lanetli yapı, âdeta bizimle alay ediyordu. Ben de bir Hür Tacir'e yakışır şekilde bu meydan okumayı kabul ettim. İnişimiz, platformlar arasında baş döndürücü sıçramalar dizisine dönüştü. Duvarlardaki birkaç yan koridoru keşfedebildiğim için beni düşmekten kurtaran ve başarıya ulaştıran tek şey, vücudumun kutsandığı demir kutak oldu.

languages.text: Niemand wusste, was kommen würde. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} spendeten gerade genug Licht, um die in die Dunkelheit führenden Wände und zahllose über der Leere schwebende Plattformen zu erhellen. Die verfluchte Struktur schien uns zu verspotten, und ich nahm die Herausforderung an, wie es sich für einen Freihändler geziemt. Der Abstieg bestand aus einigen schwindelerregenden Sprüngen zwischen Plattformen, und allein das Ferrum sanctum, mit dem mein Körper gesegnet war, bewahrte mich vor dem Absturz und sicherte meinen Erfolg, da ich in den Wänden mehrere Seitengänge entdeckte.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. It was as if the accursed structure were mocking us, and I accepted its challenge, as befitted a Rogue Trader. The descent became a series of vertiginous leaps between platforms, and it was only the Ferrum Sanctum my body was blessed with that saved me from falling and granted me success, as I was able to discover several side corridors in the walls.

traits.locale_text: Niemand wusste, was kommen würde. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} spendeten gerade genug Licht, um die in die Dunkelheit führenden Wände und zahllose über der Leere schwebende Plattformen zu erhellen. Die verfluchte Struktur schien uns zu verspotten, und ich nahm die Herausforderung an, wie es sich für einen Freihändler geziemt. Der Abstieg bestand aus einigen schwindelerregenden Sprüngen zwischen Plattformen, und allein das Ferrum sanctum, mit dem mein Körper gesegnet war, bewahrte mich vor dem Absturz und sicherte meinen Erfolg, da ich in den Wänden mehrere Seitengänge entdeckte.

languages.text: 下には未知の領域が広がっていた。ルミナスが照らす壁は、暗闇に続く滑らかな壁だった。呪われたこの構造物は我々を嘲笑うかのようだった。だが、私はローグ・トレーダーとしてその挑戦を受け入れた。長い年月をかけて身体の一部となった増幅装置は、私を裏切らなかった。そのおかげで、私はユーティリティ・トンネルにつながるいくつかの脇道を見つけることができた。
languages.original_text: The unknown awaited below. Lumens provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness. The cursed structure seemed to be mocking us, and I took up its challenge as any Rogue Trader should. The augmentations that had become part of my body over many long years did not let me down. Thanks to them, I was able to discover several side corridors leading to utility tunnels.

traits.locale_text: 下には未知の領域が広がっていた。ルミナスが照らす壁は、暗闇に続く滑らかな壁だった。呪われたこの構造物は我々を嘲笑うかのようだった。だが、私はローグ・トレーダーとしてその挑戦を受け入れた。長い年月をかけて身体の一部となった増幅装置は、私を裏切らなかった。そのおかげで、私はユーティリティ・トンネルにつながるいくつかの脇道を見つけることができた。
